calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an adult and two minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Tito Sampaio de Andrade was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minors Matthew de Andrade and Gabriel de Andrade, both of whom were present at todays hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Fabiana de Andrade, the minors' mother, was also present, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Service in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Paulo Sampaio de Andrade.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Matthew Alves de Andrade and Gabriel Alves de Andrade.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
